attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: {"choices": [{"message": {"role": "assistant", "content": "Daraz has an easy return policy for both Daraz Mall and regular products. If a product is damaged, defective, incorrect, or incomplete at the time of delivery, you can initiate a return request on the app or website. The return window is 7 days for marketplace items and 14 days for Daraz Mall items from the date of delivery. Some products are not eligible for return if they are \"No longer needed.\" For device-related issues after usage or expiration of the return window, you may be referred to the brand warranty center. Returning an item is free, whether you use \"Pick-up\" or \"Drop-off\" options.", "tool_calls": null, "refusal": null, "tool_call_id": null}, "finish_reason": null}]}
